settings:
{"settings":"{
  "[html]": {
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
  },
  "editor.linkedEditing": true,
  "[css]": {
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
  },
  "editor.bracketPairColorization.enabled": true,
  "editor.guides.bracketPairs": true,
  "liveServer.settings.donotShowInfoMsg": true,
  "[python]": {
    "diffEditor.ignoreTrimWhitespace": false,
    "editor.formatOnType": true,
    "editor.wordBasedSuggestions": "off",
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "ms-python.autopep8",
    "editor.formatOnSave": true,
  },
  "editor.wordWrap": "on",
  "editor.bracketPairColorization.independentColorPoolPerBracketType": true,
  "python.terminal.launchArgs": [],
  "terminal.integrated.focusAfterRun": "terminal",
  "python.terminal.focusAfterLaunch": true,

  "editor.rulers": [
    {
      "column": 80,
      "color": "#ff00FF",
    },
    100, // <- a ruler in the default color or as customized (with "editorRuler.foreground") at column 100
    {
      "column": 120,
      "color": "#ff0000",
    },
  ],
  "editor.formatOnPaste": true,
  "editor.formatOnSave": true,
  "editor.formatOnType": true,
  "editor.renderWhitespace": "boundary",
  "git.confirmSync": false,
  "editor.fontFamily": "Menlo, Fira Code, Monaco, 'Courier New', monospace",
  "editor.fontLigatures": true,
  "git.ignoreMissingGitWarning": true,
  "autopep8.args": ["--max-line-length", "120", "--experimental"],
  "googleTranslateExt.languages": ["en", "ru"],
  "[json]": {
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
  },
  "translate.default.lang": "Russian",
  "vscodeGoogleTranslate.preferredLanguage": "Russian",
  "files.autoSave": "onFocusChange",
  "autoDocstring.docstringFormat": "sphinx-notypes",
  "git.enableSmartCommit": true,
  "git.autofetch": true,
  "git.openRepositoryInParentFolders": "always",
  "editor.tokenColorCustomizations": {
    "textMateRules": [
      {
        "name": "One Dark italic",
        "scope": [
          "comment",
          "entity.other.attribute-name",
          "keyword",
          "markup.underline.link",
          "storage.modifier",
          "storage.type",
          "string.url",
          "variable.language.super",
          "variable.language.this",
        ],
        "settings": {
          "fontStyle": "italic",
        },
      },
      {
        "name": "One Dark italic reset",
        "scope": [
          "keyword.operator",
          "keyword.other.type",
          "storage.modifier.import",
          "storage.modifier.package",
          "storage.type.built-in",
          "storage.type.function.arrow",
          "storage.type.generic",
          "storage.type.java",
          "storage.type.primitive",
        ],
        "settings": {
          "fontStyle": "",
        },
      },
    ],
  },
  "[jsonc]": {
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
  },
  "flake8.args": ["--max-line-length=120"],
  "autoDocstring.startOnNewLine": true,
  "terminal.integrated.showExitAlert": false,
  "debug.terminal.clearBeforeReusing": true,
  "terminal.integrated.enablePersistentSessions": false,
  "editor.minimap.enabled": false,
  "workbench.productIconTheme": "a-file-icon-vscode-product-icon-theme",
  "workbench.editorAssociations": {
    "*.pdf": "analyticsignal.preview-pdf",
    "*.db": "sqlite-viewer.option",
  },
  "editor.fontSize": 12,
  "indentRainbow.excludedLanguages": ["plaintext"],
  "indentRainbow.lightIndicatorStyleLineWidth": 2,
  "python.testing.pytestEnabled": true,
  "powershell.pester.codeLens": false,
  "testExplorer.addToEditorContextMenu": true,
  "codeium.enableCodeLens": false,
  "editor.codeLens": false,
  "cSpell.language": "en,ru",
  "[sql]": {},
  "codeium.enableConfig": {
    "*": true,
    "ignore": true,
    "markdown": true,
    "django-html": true,
    "pip-requirements": true,
    "plaintext": true,
  },
  "terminal.integrated.scrollback": 3000,
  "terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.windows": "PowerShell",
  "workbench.iconTheme": "material-icon-theme",
  "cSpell.enableFiletypes": ["django-html"],
  "sqltools.useNodeRuntime": true,
  "explorer.fileNesting.patterns": {
    "*.ts": "${capture}.js",
    "*.js": "${capture}.js.map, ${capture}.min.js, ${capture}.d.ts",
    "*.jsx": "${capture}.js",
    "*.tsx": "${capture}.ts",
    "tsconfig.json": "tsconfig.*.json",
    "package.json": "package-lock.json, yarn.lock, pnpm-lock.yaml, bun.lockb",
    "*.sqlite": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.db": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.sqlite3": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.db3": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.sdb": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.s3db": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
  },
  "codesnippetsai.defaultModel": "GPT-4",
  "python.globalModuleInstallation": true,
  "gitlens.views.drafts.avatars": false,
  "[django-html]": {
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
  },
  "workbench.colorTheme": "Night Owl",
  "typescript.locale": "ru",
  "editor.inlineSuggest.suppressSuggestions": true,
  "sqlite3-editor.ui.displayLanguage": "ru",
  // === НАСТРОЙКИ CODY ===
  "cody.chat.preInstruction": "Ты отвечаешь на русском языке.",
  "cody.commandCodeLenses": true,
  "cody.autocomplete.languages": {
    "*": true,
  },
  "cody.autocomplete.enabled": true,
  "cody.internal.unstable": true,
  "cody.experimental.commitMessage": true,
  "cody.debug.verbose": true,
  "cody.experimental.tracing": true,
  "cody.autocomplete.formatOnAccept": true,
  "Cody.Agentic.Context": {
    "allow": ["*"],
  },
  "prettier.bracketSameLine": true,
  "window.menuBarVisibility": "classic",
  "telemetry.telemetryLevel": "off",
  "telemetry.enableTelemetry": true,
  "cody.suggestions.mode": "auto-edit",
  "deepseek.lang": "ru",
  "deepseek.enableCompletion": true,
  "editor.experimental.treeSitterTelemetry": true,
  "python.analysis.enablePerfTelemetry": true,
  "python.analysis.reportExtraTelemetry": true,
  "editor.experimental.preferTreeSitter.ini": true,
  "editor.experimental.preferTreeSitter.css": true,
  "editor.experimental.preferTreeSitter.regex": true,
  "editor.experimental.preferTreeSitter.typescript": true,
  "cody.customHeaders": {},
  "pgsql.serverGroups": [
    {
      "name": "Servers",
      "id": "0194CE48-1C64-4640-9B18-E93D85121483",
      "isDefault": true,
    },
  ],
  "pgsql.connections": [
    {
      "id": "51E5134C-E506-4BE1-B58A-6078930AF377",
      "groupId": "0194CE48-1C64-4640-9B18-E93D85121483",
      "authenticationType": "SqlLogin",
      "connectTimeout": 15,
      "applicationName": "vscode-pgsql",
      "clientEncoding": "utf8",
      "sslmode": "prefer",
      "server": "localhost",
      "user": "postgres",
      "database": "repetitor_db",
      "password": "",
      "profileName": "repetitor",
      "expiresOn": 0,
    },
  ],
  "Codegeex.Chat.LanguagePreference": "English",
  "Codegeex.Comment.LanguagePreference": "English",
  "Codegeex.SidebarUI.LanguagePreference": "English",
  "Codegeex.CommitMessage.LanguagePreference": "English",
  "gigacode.inlineCompletionColor": "blue",
  "workbench.colorCustomizations": {
    "editorGhostText.foreground": "#2CD7F6",
  },
  "gigacode.cloudIdentify": true,
  "Codegeex.Privacy": true,
  "gigacode.lookupPriority": true,
  "gigacode.common.wholeLineReplacement": true,
  "Codegeex.CompletionModel": "CodeGeeX Pro[Beta]",
  "tabnine.experimentalAutoImports": true,
  "prettier.printWidth": 120,
  "djlint.formatCss": true,
  "djlint.formatJs": true,
  "chat.disableAIFeatures": true,
  "keyboard.layout": "00000419",
}"}
